allow: PowerShell($tools = 'git','gh'; foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "$t => $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "$t => NON installato" } }; Write-Output "---"; if \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { try { gh auth status 2>&1 | Out-String } catch { "gh non autenticato" } })
